title: cordyline ensifolia
intro: Cordyline ensifolia, also known as 'Ti Kouka' or 'New Zealand cabbage tree', is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional Maori medicine, prized for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Cordyline ensifolia can be used in herbal preparations like infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
